Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I need to create an event log from multiple tables Each row should represent an event with Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource Actor and Other Attributes The case ID should be the order_id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to derive activities from various tables Orders table Order Created Order Lines Items Picked one event per item Delivery table Order Dispatched and Order Arrived Invoice table Invoice Issued Payments table Payment Received

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me trace through each order to ensure I capture all events chronologically

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I also need to enrich with resources using the Resources table
